edits.rationale: The content of the clause has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation in the Work Instruction.
Equipment ID 2847.420.0018 has been superseded by 2847.420.0019 in v2.
edits.old_text: Personnel must complete the Operational Readiness Review (ORR) training and be familiar with the AIQS requirements. Prior to executing this procedure, ensure that a Nonconformance Report (NCR) is generated for any identified nonconforming materials. Personnel must also be trained in Lockout-Tagout (LOTO) procedures to safely handle equipment, including the Hydraulic Press (Asset ID: 2847.420.0018) and the Precision Surface Grinder (Asset ID: 2847.310.0055). Refer to AIQS 4.2.2 for additional training requirements.
edits.new_text: Personnel must complete the Operational Readiness Review (ORR) training and be familiar with the AIQS requirements. Prior to executing this procedure, ensure that a Nonconformance Report (NCR) is generated for any identified nonconforming materials. Personnel must also be trained in Lockout-Tagout (LOTO) procedures to safely handle equipment, including the Hydraulic Press (Asset ID: 2847.420.0019) and the Precision Surface Grinder (Asset ID: 2847.310.0055). Refer to AIQS 4.2.2 for additional training requirements.
